traits.name: Anima
traits.description: After losing a player combat, gain 15 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown. Each time Animas get 100 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time. (3) Start Researching! (6) Gain a loot Orb upon win

variants.description: After losing a player combat, gain 15 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown. Each time Animas get 100 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time. (3) Start Researching! (6) Gain a loot Orb upon win

traits.name: Arbiter
traits.description: Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs. (2) Choose a cause and effect for your law (3) Effects are stronger.

variants.description: Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs. (2) Choose a cause and effect for your law (3) Effects are stronger.

traits.name: Bastion
traits.description: Your team gains 12 [Armor] [Magic resist] . Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat. (2) 16 [Armor] [Magic resist] (4) 35 [Armor] [Magic resist] (6) 55 [Armor] [Magic resist] ; Non-Bastions gain an additional 20 [Armor] [Magic resist] .

variants.description: Your team gains 12 [Armor] [Magic resist] . Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat. (2) 16 [Armor] [Magic resist] (4) 35 [Armor] [Magic resist] (6) 55 [Armor] [Magic resist] ; Non-Bastions gain an additional 20 [Armor] [Magic resist] .

traits.name: Brawler
traits.description: Your team gains 7% [Health] . Brawlers gain more. (2) +25% maximum Health (4) +45% maximum Health (6) +65% maximum Health

variants.description: Your team gains 7% [Health] . Brawlers gain more. (2) +25% maximum Health (4) +45% maximum Health (6) +65% maximum Health

traits.name: Bulwark
traits.description: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield and 20% Attack Speed.

variants.description: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield and 20% Attack Speed.

traits.name: Challenger
traits.description: Your team gains 10% [Attack speed] . Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by 50% for 2.50 seconds. (2) 15% [Attack speed] (3) 22% [Attack speed] (4) 30% [Attack speed] (5) 40% [Attack speed]

(2) 15% [Attack speed] (3) 22% [Attack speed] (4) 30% [Attack speed] (5) 40% [Attack speed]

traits.name: Channeler
traits.description: Innate: Channelers gain 20% additional Mana from all sources. Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Channelers. (2) 1% Mana Regen | 3% Mana Regen (3) 1% Mana Regen | 4% Mana Regen (4) 2% Mana Regen | 6% Mana Regen (5) 2% Mana Regen | 7% Mana Regen

traits.name: Commander
traits.description: Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.

variants.description: Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.

traits.name: Dark Lady
traits.description: Allies take 5% less damage from abilities, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

variants.description: Allies take 5% less damage from abilities, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

traits.name: Dark Star
traits.description: (2) Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at 10% max health. (4) AND they gain 30% [Attack damage] [Ability power] . (6) AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining 100% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes. (9) All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.

(6) AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining 100% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes. (9) All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.

traits.name: Divine Duelist
traits.description: You heal for 15% of player damage you deal. Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

variants.description: You heal for 15% of player damage you deal. Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

traits.name: Doomer
traits.description: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing 8% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

variants.description: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing 8% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

traits.name: Eradicator
traits.description: Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist.

variants.description: Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist.

traits.name: Factory New
traits.description: After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves. Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

variants.description: After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves. Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

traits.name: Fateweaver
traits.description: Innate: Fateweavers have Precision. (2) Chance effects on abilities are Lucky. (4) Gain 20% Crit Chance and 10% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.

variants.description: Innate: Fateweavers have Precision. (2) Chance effects on abilities are Lucky. (4) Gain 20% Crit Chance and 10% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.

traits.name: Galaxy Hunter
traits.description: Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment. While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage.

variants.description: Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment. While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage.

traits.name: Gun Goddess
traits.description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

variants.description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

traits.name: Marauder
traits.description: Your team gains 5% [Omnivamp] . Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to 25% max Health.) (2) 5% [Omnivamp] , 20% [Attack damage] (4) 7% [Omnivamp] , 30% [Attack damage] (6) 10% [Omnivamp] , 40% [Attack damage] .

traits.name: Mecha
traits.description: Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining 60% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait. (3) Energy Cells: Mechas gain 20% [Attack damage] [Ability power] . (4) Overclocked Cells: Increased to 35% [Attack damage] [Ability power] . (6) Precision Engineering: +1 max team size

traits.name: N.O.V.A.
traits.description: (2) 6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions. (5) Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge. Aatrox: Ally Damage 30% Shred and Sunders enemies Caitlyn: Grant allies 20% Attack Speed Akali: Allies gain Precision Maokai: Allies heal 15% max Health Kindred: Shield the strongest Tank for 800 Emblem: Allies deal 10% stacking bonus true damage

traits.name: Oracle
traits.description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

variants.description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

traits.name: Party Animal
traits.description: Once per combat, after falling below 45% percent Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in The Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in The Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

traits.name: Primordian
traits.description: (2) Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level. (3) Spawn even more Swarmlings! Each round, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion. 8% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

traits.description: Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below 50% health, they slip into shadows. traits.name: Stargazer

Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and poison enemies, repeating a portion of damage dealt as magic damage over 3 seconds. (3) 15% [Damage Reduction] , 30% poison damage (5) 20% [Damage Reduction] , 45% poison damage (7) 25% [Damage Reduction] , 60% poison damage More hexes reveal at each player level
